name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Cat Treats - 100% Natural Mini Chicken & Cod Flakes 50g
description: Reflex Cat Treats - 100% Natural Mini Chicken & Cod Flakes are super-premium cat treats that are easily digested due to its high meat content. Includes fatty acids that support healthy skin and coat health. Will not cause weight gain due to its low-calorie content. INGREDIENTS: chicken (50%), cod fish (30%), starch, plant protein, glycerin, sorbitol, salt, potasium sorbate. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 32 Oil Content (%) - 5 Crude Ash (%) - 5 Crude Fiber (%) - 1 Moisture (%) - 20 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Recommended for all adult cats as a snack in addition to meals. This product does not replace your cat's daily food requirement. Store in a cool, dry place.
